commands.name: main-process-native-media-unit-tests
commands.stdoutTail:
▶ NativeScreenCapture source identity and capability reporting
  ✔ normalizes display and window sources without changing source ids (1.614801ms)
  ✔ starts display and window captures with exact source id and kind and reports diagnostics (1.041547ms)
  ✔ fails fast when native frame sink is required but unavailable (0.500503ms)
  ✔ passes caller-provided capture id and native sink handle to the platform wrapper (0.467711ms)
  ✔ reports macOS and Linux display/window capture capabilities from platform backends (0.625753ms)
✔ NativeScreenCapture source identity and capability reporting (4.771278ms)
▶ NativeVoiceEngine connection lifecycle
  ✔ does not forward native events after disconnecting a pending connect (3.117018ms)
  ✔ disconnects stale native connect completion after a replacement connect starts (1.775302ms)
✔ NativeVoiceEngine connection lifecycle (5.440365ms)
▶ NativeVoiceEngine screen frame routing
  ✔ publishes screen share with source pacing and exposes a native frame sink handle (0.897838ms)
  ✔ keeps screen-share audio published when screen video is unpublished (0.634254ms)
  ✔ replaces screen captures without releasing screen-share audio or duplicating priority (0.502586ms)
  ✔ forwards watch and unwatch operations with source, enablement, and quality intact (0.563378ms)
  ✔ reports VideoToolbox hardware capability from the native addon (0.49767ms)
  ✔ reports native voice engine capabilities from the native addon (0.56267ms)
  ✔ maps native addon microphone not-connected errors to the typed operation code (0.639129ms)
✔ NativeVoiceEngine screen frame routing (4.546943ms)
ℹ tests 14
ℹ suites 3
ℹ pass 14

ℹ cancelled 0
ℹ skipped 0
ℹ todo 0
ℹ duration_ms 81.841144
